## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the forward structure of the AirOps-fwd.digital partnership, addressing challenges and aligning on future collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital facing challenges in scaling services, client retention, and AI enablement](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [AirOps seeking fair economic model for platform usage and partnership](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Both parties aim to refine offering structure, pricing, and collaboration approach](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Agreement to develop a new framework for partnership over next 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital Business Challenges

  - [Struggling with client retention due to short-term (3-month) engagements](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Difficulty in scaling AI enablement services due to high time investment](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Challenges in presenting and collaborating on workflows with clients](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Recruiting high-caliber talent ($7-8k/month) to meet custom client requests](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

### AirOps Platform Development

  - [Introducing "co-pilot" feature for improved workflow building and debugging](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Anticipating significant improvements in build time (30-70% reduction) by January](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Focus on making the workflow builder less intimidating for new users](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)

### Partnership Structure and Economics

  - [Need for a core agreement on platform usage and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Considering tiered approach: experimental credits + fair-cost usage pricing](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Potential for applying credits from client accounts to fwd.digital's account](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Last month's task usage was \~$13.5k, which may need optimization](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)

### Client Engagement and Co-selling

  - [Challenges in upselling AirOps to content service clients](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Proposal to share logos and case studies for mutual benefit](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Need for clearer process on introducing AirOps to high-potential clients (e.g., Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)

### AI Enablement Services

  - [High demand but low follow-through from clients after workshops](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Difficulty in scaling due to intensive time investment and low client engagement](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)

## Next Steps

  - [AirOps to propose a new economic model and partnership structure for next 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
  - [fwd.digital to review internal processes for optimizing AirOps usage](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Explore ways to artfully share logos and case studies for mutual benefit](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [AirOps to provide access to the new co-pilot feature](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
  - [Both parties to align on a strategy for introducing AirOps to high-potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/iUeSQBmNxpzBqg4qqKU3KU82QEquNzTj?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
